nasb.text: Then the king said to him, “How many times must I adjure you to speak to me nothing but the truth in the name of the Lord?”

esv.text: But the king said to him, “How many times shall I make you swear that you speak to me nothing but the truth in the name of the Lord?”

cnv.text: 王對他說：“我要囑咐你多少次，你才奉耶和華的名對我只說真話呢？”

ccb.text: 王却说：“我要嘱咐你多少次，你才肯奉耶和华的名对我说实话呢？”
